title: senna tropica
intro: Senna tropica, also known as the tropical senna, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and distinctive leaf shape. The medicinal properties of Senna tropica lie in its seeds, which contain anthraquinone glycosides, particularly sennosides, that act as a laxative and help stimulate bowel movements. The health benefits of Senna tropica include its ability to relieve constipation, promote digestion, and support the removal of toxins from the body. Senna tropica is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and extracts, to aid in weight loss, reduce bloating, and improve overall gut health.
